collections.name: abundance
collections.description: Curated images from ancient art illustrations brought together in color coordinated arrangements.  Beautiful birds, bugs, flowers and other natural elements related in color schemes to appeal to your decorative sensibilities.  Beautiful for wallcoverings and fabrics.  This collection can be scaled down in size.  Enjoy!!

collections.name: ancient-tiles
collections.description: Our ANCIENT TILE collection is inspired by tile fragments from throughout the world.  Produced in the original patterns and colors this wallpaper collection will bring artifacts from the past into your home.  Bring an antique tile pattern into your dining room backsplash or butler's pantry for that authentic old world look.  Each pattern repeat is 24x24 inches and can be scaled to suite your need.

collections.name: bombay
collections.description:
Our BOMBAY COLLECTION is inspired by the ancient art of block printed fabrics from India.  
Shown here in traditional colorways and designed to mix and match with endless combinations, these timeless designs can add a cozy, cottage feel to any decorating scheme.  Experiment with your favorite colors and resize the images for various looks.

collections.name: botanicals
collections.description: Botanicals and floral designs dominate many decorating themes.  Timeless in style and flexible in colorways, botanical images can stand alone or be layered without limit in homes of any style or age.  Invite nature into your decorating theme, color them and scale them to your pleasure.

patterns.name: Nile Valley
patterns.description: Art Nouveau

patterns.name: Love Spat
patterns.description: William Morris, Arts and Crafts,

collections.name: coordinates
collections.description: This collection of  Coordinates can make your design scheme hit a new level.  After you've chosen your "Feature" wallpaper print, consider adding a coordinating print for your ceiling, or book case backs, or of course, above or below your chair rail trim.  Color coordinate your prints and don't forget to adjust the scale of the print to match your target size.  Also available in fabrics, so there's no limit as to how many you can create.  Have fun!!

patterns.name: Bronte
patterns.description: Inspired by the original wallpaper inside the home of the Bronte sisters.

collections.name: coverlets
collections.description:
Our American Coverlet collection is inspired by antique woven coverlets (often fragments).  
Coverlets were popular during the 1800's in the eastern and mid-western states.  Often woven specifically for a person or family by an itinerate weaver using wool from the family's farm!!  Patterns were bold and colorful to cheer and warm the home.
We've chosen very traditional color combinations that were original to coverlets.  Each coverlet is named for the city or county where it originated.  
We hope you will enjoy the notion of using these patterns as wallpaper and fabrics for bedrooms, keeping rooms, etc.

collections.name: dished-up
collections.description: Our DISHED UP collection celebrates the collections of early English transferware.  Collectors of dishes as well as decorating enthusiasts can enjoy these patterns used as a backdrop on bookcases, kitchen walls and anywhere a splash of color is needed.  This collection can be resized to suit your space or project.

collections.name: english-cottage
collections.description: Our English Cottage collection is inspired by our travels through the English countryside.  Quaint cottages, fairytale B&Bs, cozy taverns, we all love the style and soft vibe.  Put the tea kettle on, stay home and create that feeling in your own home.  Steeped in British history and tradition, our designs combine symbols and textures

patterns.name: Greenwich Time
patterns.description: Turn time backwards with our Greenwich Time Wallpaper or fabric.  Perfect for the inside of a china cupboard, or back hallway to add color and cheer to a space.

patterns.name: Ansley Copenhagen
patterns.description: Ansley Copenhagen porcelain pattern.

patterns.name: The Iris & The Rose
patterns.description:
The Iris (fleur de lis) and the Rose (Tudor Rose).  The fleur-de-lis is a historical symbol of the French Monarchy.  It appeared in ancient civilizations, was consolidated in French heraldry, and is associated with nobility, religion, and popular culture.  
The Tudor rose (sometimes called the Union rose) is the traditional floral heraldic emblem of England and takes its name and origins from the House of Tudor, which united the house of York to the house of Lancaster.  
This pattern unites the British to the French in an ancient tapestry pattern.

collections.name: farmhouse
collections.description:
Our FARMHOUSE COLLECTION is inspired by the Rural Lifestyle.  Rockers on the front porch, vegetable gardens in the back yard, chickens running around and homes filled with generations of treasures.
Welcome the country farmhouse style into your decorating theme and color and scale them to your pleasure.

patterns.name: A Little Birdie Told Me On Antique Letters

collections.name: folksie
collections.description: Our Folksie collection embraces the itinerate country artist, often traveling the country side, stenciling and hand painting simple designs, along with everyday folks expressing their creative side with needlework, quilting, etc.  Recreated as wallcoverings and fabrics which can be completely recolored and resized to your design needs.

collections.name: galleria
collections.description: Our GALLERIA collection is a great way to create a gallery wall anywhere.  Curated from beautiful paintings, drawings and etchings from many historical sources, these collected images tell their own story.  Produced in the original patterns and colors this wallpaper collection will bring artistic illustrations from the past into your home.  This collection can be resized to suit your space or project.

collections.name: geometry
collections.description: Geometry for the clean, linear look.  Designed to be very simple, try tone on tone for a very minimal effect or bold colors to create your own artwork wall.  Color and scale to your desire.

collections.name: ikats
collections.description: Our collection of IKAT patterns can be considered neutrals or stand alone designs.  Layer them with our Coordinate collection and other decorative styles by using common colors and resize them to be appropriate for your project.  Available on wallcoverings and decorative fabrics.  Enjoy them!

collections.name: new-orleans
collections.description: Our New Orleans collection combines the romantic history of French Cajun culture and the American South.  Fantastic designs that can be recolored and resized to your desire.

collections.name: oceana
collections.description:
Our OCEANA collection says it all.  An Abundance of wonderful FISH, CRUSTEATIONS, & CORALS!  Produced in the original patterns and colors this wallpaper collection will bring artistic illustrations from the past into your home.  Each pattern repeat is 24X36 inches. 

Sample pieces are available in prepasted only and will come in 12x18.  We ship samples out in 1-2 days.

The prepasted wallpaper is printed on the finest quality papers 24 inch wide by 30 feet long paper per roll.  Each roll is custom printed and takes about 2 weeks to prepare.

The peel & stick paper is 24 inches wide by 27 feet long per roll.  It is easily removable, perfect for apartments.  see instructions below for installation.  Each roll is custom printed and takes about 2 weeks to prepare.

collections.name: silk-road
collections.description: Travel back in time with the SILK ROAD COLLECTION of Traditional DAMASK patterns.  For thousands of years, these beautiful patterns adorned fabrics from Asia to Europe and were coveted for their beautiful and designs.  Now, for the first time, they can be colored and scaled to suite your style.  Have fun!!

collections.name: traditions
collections.description: Traditional designs, appropriate in any home decor plan.  Based on history, culture and eclectic styles, layered with coordinates add richness and depth to any home.  Experiment with color combinations and resize your design to suit the surface or project.

collections.name: cabin-fever
collections.description: Welcome to the woods, the forest, the mountains and the trails.  This is your weekend get-away, the long needed rest among the trees.  Grab your hiking boots, a good book and that which keeps you warm and cozy.  Outfit your cabin with natures best inspiration of leaves, trees, lichen, and traditional plaids.  Sink in, hope for snow and relax.

collections.name: stripes
collections.description: Every stripe tells a story. Mix them, match them, layer them up — because life's too short for plain.

collections.name: pages
collections.description: Our PAGES From the Past collection says it all.  An interesting collection of Pages or Images produced in the original patterns and colors this wallpaper collection will bring artistic illustrations from the past into your home.  Rescale the size to suite your project.
